zh.Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Haget於1152年出生在英國越可爾貝弗利時，她的父親Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh28歲，母親Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.27歲。她於1170年與William Moreton在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年95歲。

zh-hans.Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Haget于1152年出生在英国越可爾貝弗利时，她的父亲Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh28岁，母亲Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.27岁。她于1170年与William Moreton在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pagett
meanings: English: variant of   Paget   or   Padgett  .

variants.name: Page
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Haget was born in 1152, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh, was 28 and her mother, Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., was 27. She married William Moreton in 1170, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1247, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Haget est née en 1152, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Moreton en 1170, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1247, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Haget 1152 in Beverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh 28 und ihre Mutter Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. 27. Sie hat 1170 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England William Moreton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1247 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Haget è nata il nel 1152 nel Beverley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William Moreton nel 1170, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1247, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hagetが1152年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで生まれた時，父Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaughは28歳，母Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.は27歳であった。1170年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでWilliam Moretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Haget(이)가 1152년 영국 요르크실르 베벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1170년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 William Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Haget nasceu em 1152, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Moreton em 1170, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1247, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Haget родилась в 1152 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Moreton в 1170 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1247 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Haget nació en 1152, en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bertrand Haget of Wighill, Bainton and Healaugh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray., tenía 27 años. Se casó con William Moreton en 1170, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1247, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
